message:
feat(demo): add Responsive Layout demo screen with 15 tests (bd-130l.5)

New 14th screen demonstrating ResponsiveLayout, Visibility, and
Responsive<T>. Shows 1/2/3-column layout switching at breakpoints,
live breakpoint indicator, and per-breakpoint value adaptation.
Registered in ScreenId, ScreenStates, chrome accent_for.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
